title: antirrhinum vulgare
intro: Antirrhinum vulgare, commonly known as the common snapdragon, is a flowering plant in the figwort family that is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which help to relieve coughs, colds, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Antirrhinum vulgare include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and asthma. Antirrhinum vulgare can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a popular herbal remedy for respiratory and digestive issues.
